title: VNSales
description: A practical student management platform built for businesses, including modules for customer management, sales tracking, and reporting.
longDescription: A comprehensive sales management platform developed for a real business. The system manages customer records, tracks sales performance, generates reports, and streamlines business workflows. Deployed to production with a custom domain.
problem: The business needed a centralized system to manage customer data, track sales performance, and generate reports — replacing manual spreadsheets.
solution: Built a full-stack sales management platform with customer management modules, real-time sales tracking, automated reporting, and role-based access control. Designed a PostgreSQL database schema optimized for business workflows.

title: NinjaShop
description: An online toy store management system built with React 19 and Node.js, featuring product management, cart, and order processing.
longDescription: A full-featured e-commerce platform for managing an online toy store. Built with React 19 and Vite on the frontend, with a Node.js Express backend connected to MongoDB. Includes product management, shopping cart, order processing, user authentication, and sales analytics with Recharts.
problem: Small toy businesses lack an affordable digital platform to manage products, process orders, and track sales online.
solution: Developed a complete e-commerce system with a React 19 frontend (Vite), Node.js Express API, and MongoDB database. Features include product CRUD, cart management, order workflows, JWT authentication, and interactive sales dashboards.

title: PawPal
description: A service-oriented architecture (SOA) project for pet product and service management with microservices.
longDescription: A service-oriented architecture (SOA) practice project that manages pet products and services. The system uses a React 19 (Vite) frontend with a Node.js API gateway routing to multiple backend microservices, each handling a specific domain. Uses MongoDB for data persistence.
problem: Pet owners and service providers need a unified platform to manage pet profiles, products, and care services efficiently.
solution: Designed an SOA-based system with a React 19 client, a Node.js API Gateway, and multiple microservices for user management, pet profiles, product inventory, and service booking. Uses MongoDB and ensures loose coupling between services.

title: Vu Tru Gom
description: A branding-focused e-commerce website for a pottery startup, reaching Top 12 in the Student Startup Competition 2025-2026.
longDescription: A branding-focused e-commerce website for a pottery startup. Designed to showcase the brand identity while providing online store functionality. The project reached Top 12 in the Student Startup Idea Competition 2025-2026, demonstrating product thinking and execution skills.
problem: A ceramics startup needs a website that balances brand storytelling and identity certification, along with e-commerce functionality, to attract customers and investors.
solution: Created a brand-first website with visual storytelling elements, product galleries, and integrated e-commerce capabilities. Focused on user experience and brand presence to support both sales and pitch presentations.
challenges: Balancing brand identity with UI design

title: Roll Call
description: A student attendance management system with QR check-in, real-time statistics, and responsive glassmorphism UI.
longDescription: A digital roll call system built for Tra Vinh University. Features QR code-based student check-in, real-time attendance tracking, comprehensive statistics dashboard, and role-based access for admins. Built with a dark futuristic UI featuring glassmorphism design and smooth animations.
problem: Educational institutions needed to digitize attendance tracking — replacing paper roll calls with an efficient, real-time digital system.
solution: Developed a Next.js 16 application with QR barcode generation (jsbarcode) for student check-in, FingerprintJS for device recognition, real-time attendance stats, and an admin dashboard with exportable reports. Features a premium glassmorphism dark UI.

title: CostShare
description: A group expense sharing and debt balancing app with a dark futuristic UI, built with Next.js 16 and MongoDB.
longDescription: A full-stack web application for group expense sharing and debt balancing. Features include JWT authentication, group management, session-based expense tracking, multi-payer expense splitting, automatic equal split calculation, a greedy debt simplifier algorithm, settlement tracking, and a comprehensive dashboard. Built with a dark futuristic UI featuring cyan glow effects and glassmorphism.
problem: Friends and groups need a simple way to split expenses, track shared costs, and settle debts without manual calculations or confusing spreadsheets.
solution: Built a Next.js 16 application with MongoDB, JWT authentication (jose), and Zustand state management. Core features include group creation, session-based expense management, multi-payer support, auto equal-split, a greedy algorithm debt simplifier, and settlement tracking. All with a premium dark futuristic UI.
